title: Routes Specs Mutate
description: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Specs Mutate** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. This route group is limited to workspace-level spec validation.
context: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Specs Mutate** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. This route group is limited to workspace-level spec validation.

rules: `POST /v1/workspaces/{ws}/specs/validate` MUST run `ValidateSpecs` either for the whole workspace or for a single canonical spec selected by the optional `specPath` query parameter.

The route MUST declare schema validation for `ws` params and optional `specPath` query input before handler logic runs. Invalid input MUST return HTTP 400 with `application/problem+json` and code `INVALID_REQUEST`.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Versioned API path
when: client calls the documented route with /v1 prefix
then: AND unprefixed legacy path is not registered

scenarios.name: POST validate runs ValidateSpecs
then: AND response lists structural validation findings

scenarios.name: Undocumented path returns 404
when: client requests a URL outside this routes contract

scenarios.name: Validate rejects empty workspace id or malformed params
when: route params do not satisfy the declared schema
